failures.description: ProductCatalogSearch timed out before returning catalog evidence, so the agent could not determine the cheapest available Skateboard.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal and plan matched the user request: find the cheapest available Skateboard using ProductCatalogSearch. The tool invocation at index 3 was well-formed and matched the planned arguments. The failure was explicitly a dependency timeout: CatalogServiceTimeoutError with message 'catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms'. This is an infrastructure/connectivity-style tool failure, not a malformed invocation, misunderstanding, invented information, or guardrail/access block. The later steps only reported inability to complete and rejected the answer; they did not resolve the missing tool evidence.
